description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a casual urban appearance, featuring long straight hair and wearing a short-sleeve t-shirt with a graphic print on the front. The individual is dressed in fitted jeans and athletic sneakers, presenting a relaxed and approachable demeanor. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the posture is upright and balanced. The face is partially obscured by large, wraparound sunglasses, adding a modern accessory to the look. The overall build is average, with natural body proportions and no visible carried items. The clothing and accessories suggest a style suitable for everyday activities in city environments.
description: An adult pedestrian with long hair, sunglasses, a graphic t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers in a casual urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the graphic t-shirt, sunglasses, and full facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair length, and the fit of the jeans and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the t-shirt, the full length of the hair, and the back of the jeans and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, hair drape, and the side of the sneakers and jeans.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and jeans with athletic sneakers and sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
